notes: Run 5 (2026-07-20): diffed against the Run 4 SHA (9ff043b7, 2026-07-18) to current staging HEAD (a3bbccc). Only one commit touching webapp/ landed in that range: 696f9983 'feat(strategies): provision wallet at creation + setup gate for chat strategies' — confirmed fully gated behind the backend-only STRATEGY_SUB_AGENTS_ENABLED env flag (default false, no deploy-config override found in-repo; every write path that sets ScheduleChat.strategy_agent_id / run_state=AWAITING_SETUP is wrapped in `if sub_agents_enabled()`), so its onboarding-reuse UI and 'Setup needed' schedule-card state are unreachable dead code for normal users today. Not documented. Light full sweep of webapp/app/(authenticated)/* found no new undocumented reachable route, but surfaced a real, previously-missed OUTDATED cluster: the default landing route '/app' (Home) was restructured from a pure chat screen into a workbench-style dashboard (Row 1: quick-ask chat box + Portfolio snapshot; Row 2: Market Pulse/Polymarket highlights; Row 3: Strategies/Polymarket; Row 4: trending tokens/Points) — the old full chat/research landing (greeting + ask box + suggested queries) moved to a new /research route, reachable via 'Chats' in the sidebar (webapp/app/(authenticated)/app/page.tsx + research/page.tsx, webapp/components/home-showcase/*). Separately, recipe cards (Trending Tokens / DCA on Frequency / Buy Token on Chain) moved from the Home screen to the Strategies page's existing 'Start a Strategy' section, rendered as a flat inline grid — the standalone Recipe Library modal/page was removed (webapp/app/(authenticated)/(chat-interface)/strategies/timeline-strategies-view.tsx; confirmed via e2e test comment 'Recipe cards moved from /app to /strategies ... no Strategy Library modal'). strategies.mdx's existing 'Start a Strategy' section already described this correctly (a prior run apparently caught it there), but index.mdx ('Interface at a Glance'), agent.mdx ('How It Works'), and recipes.mdx (both the intro and the 'Browse Recipes' step) still described the old Home-is-chat / recipes-on-Home layout — fixed all three for consistency. Re-verified the flag mechanism is unchanged: webapp/app/.well-known/vercel/flags/route.ts still registers exactly account-deletion (on for everyone) and yield-page (gated via isHyperliquidInternalIdentity allowlist in webapp/lib/flags/hyperliquid-segment.ts) — /yield stays out of scope. Also noted webapp/lib/flags/market-summary-maintenance.ts, an env-driven ops kill-switch for Market Pulse generation during maintenance windows — not a permanent gate, doesn't change docs scope.
